SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?city ?cityLabel WHERE {
  ?city wdt:P31 wd:Q515 ; wdt:P1082 ?population .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?city rdfs:label ?cityLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?cityLabel) = "en")
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?population)
LIMIT 3
```

Execution result:
Got 3 rows and 2 columns:
| city      | cityLabel          |
| --------- | ------------------ |
| wd:Q956   | Beijing (lang:en)  |
| wd:Q30002 | Chengdu (lang:en)  |
| wd:Q15174 | Shenzhen (lang:en) |
